basic.description:
{Warfare — Basic [WOG Enhanced]}

These three skills are permanently linked.

Ballistics (Catapult): 1 extra wall hit/turn.
Artillery (Ballista): 50% double-damage; attacks twice per round.
First Aid Tent: Heals up to 100 HP per turn.

advanced.description:
{Warfare — Advanced [WOG Enhanced]}

These three skills are permanently linked.

Ballistics (Catapult): 2 extra wall hits/turn.
Artillery (Ballista): 75% double-damage; attacks twice per round.
First Aid Tent: Heals up to 150 HP per turn.

expert.description:
{Warfare — Expert [WOG Enhanced]}

These three skills are permanently linked.

Ballistics (Catapult): 3 extra wall hits; can target any section.
Artillery (Ballista): Always double damage; attacks three times per round.
First Aid Tent: Heals up to 200 HP per turn; can revive fallen units.
